content: When rendering issue badges in seeds, formatters must receive a closedBlockerIds set. Compute once per command: const closedBlockerIds = new Set(allIssues.filter(i => i.status === 'closed').map(i => i.id)). Pass to formatIssueOneLine, formatIssueOneLineCompact, printIssueOneLine. Without the set, issues whose blockers have all been closed still render with [blocked] tag. Call sites: src/commands/{list,ready,blocked,show,search,dep,tpl}.ts.

When porting the L5 governance baseline (.github/) into a sub-repo from templates/l5-toolkit/github/: issue templates use a <cli> placeholder that must be replaced with the repo's binary name (sd for seeds), and ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml's discussions URL must point at the per-repo GitHub (https://github.com/jayminwest/seeds/discussions), not the os-eco meta-repo. dependabot.yml and pull_request_template.md copy verbatim (already neutral). Do not touch pre-existing .github/workflows/.

name: l5-config-port-adapt-to-baseline
description: Porting L5 toolkit lint/dup/dep configs into a sub-repo with existing code: biome's noExcessiveCognitiveComplexity (cap 15) flags pre-existing command/parser functions — list offenders in a biome overrides[] block with the rule 'off' (mirrors canopy) so the cap governs new code without a refactor (commit guidance forbids source changes in scaffolding). jscpd threshold is adapted to current state: seeds baseline was 3.46%, so threshold=4 (not the ideal 3%) per porting-playbook 'adapt budgets/thresholds to current state'; ratchet-to-3% is a separate seed. knip: seeds tsconfig uses types:['bun-types'] (transitive via @types/bun) which knip reports as Unresolved — fix in knip.json with ignoreUnresolved:['bun-types'] rather than editing tsconfig (tsconfig edits are out of scope). extensions/**/*.ts entry+project globs match nothing today and emit non-fatal knip configuration hints; that is the intended future-proof tolerance, not an error. bunfig.toml: omit [test] root so bun's recursive discovery covers both src/ and extensions/.

name: l5-ratchet-port-colocated-budgets
description: Porting L5 toolkit ratchet scripts (check-file-sizes/check-debt-markers) into seeds with budgets co-located in scripts/ (not toolkit's ../budgets/ default): keep scripts verbatim (no logic change) and pass --budget scripts/<file>.json in the package.json check:size/check:debt entries. Adapt colocated *.test.ts: replace TOOLKIT_ROOT=resolve(import.meta.dir,'..') with SCRIPT_DIR=import.meta.dir, and point the CLI spawn + well-formed-budget reads at resolve(SCRIPT_DIR,'<file>'). The verbatim scripts trip biome noExcessiveCognitiveComplexity (scan() at 22/30 vs cap 15) so grandfather both into the existing biome.json complexity-off override rather than refactoring. Baseline file-size at threshold 500 with per-file budgets ceil(lines/50)*50+50 for the 5 files over 500; debt tracker prefixes sd-/seeds-/mx- as a hex regex plus #NNN and URL.
